column1: Through several energy efficient initiatives, we maintained a reduction of our carbon footprints while
optimally utilizing available resources. We introduced the use of Signature Pads to enable customers
electronically deposit and withdraw cash, as well as register complaints to reduce paper usage in some
subsidiaries with possible expansion across group. Also, circulation of paper was reduced to encourage reuse
of used paper. We continue to take similar actions across subsidiaries to reduce paper usage in the workplace
by implementing the use of other electronic means of transmitting information i.e., emails, Microsoft Team,
